channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NIBE] NIBE CFO Jigar Shah Resigns Effective April 11, 2026
item.description:
NIBE Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Jigar Shah from his position as Chief Financial Officer and Key Managerial Personnel. His resignation is effective from the close of business hours on April 11, 2026. The company disclosed that the reason for Mr. Shah's departure is a "Health Issue," as confirmed in his resignation letter. This change has been reported in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • NIBE Ltd's Chief Financial Officer, Mr. Jigar Shah, has resigned.
  • His resignation is effective from April 11, 2026.
  • The stated reason for his departure is a health issue.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NIBE Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [NIBE] NIBE CFO Jigar Shah Resigns Due to Health Issues
item.description:
NIBE Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Jigar Shah from the position of Chief Financial Officer and Key Managerial Personnel, effective from the close of business hours on April 11, 2026. The company stated that Mr. Shah's resignation is due to health issues. The necessary disclosures, including the resignation letter, have been filed in accordance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • NIBE Ltd's CFO, Jigar Shah, has resigned.
  • Resignation is effective from April 11, 2026.
  • The reason for resignation is cited as health issues.
  • Mr. Shah was also a Key Managerial Personnel.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NIBE Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [EVERESTIND] Everest Industries completes Phase I land sale for ₹100.83 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Everest Industries Ltd has concluded Phase I of its vacant land sale in Podanur, Coimbatore, by executing a Sale Deed with G Square Properties Private Limited on April 10, 2026. The company sold 16.84 acres, receiving ₹100.83 crore. This amount is part of the total consideration of ₹133.86 crore for the entire land parcel. The remaining 6.48 acres are expected to be sold by November 4, 2026. The transaction is not considered a related party transaction.

  • Everest Industries sold 16.84 acres of vacant land in Coimbatore.
  • Received ₹100.83 crore from Phase I of the land sale.
  • Total land sale consideration is ₹133.86 crore.
  • Balance 6.48 acres expected to be sold by November 2026.
  • The transaction is with G Square Properties Private Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EVEREST INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Sale

item.title: [WITS] Wherrelz IT Board to consider H2/FY26 results & preferential issue
item.description:
Wherrelz IT Solutions Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 17, 2026. The key agenda items for the meeting include the consideration and approval of the audited financial results for the half-year and full year ended March 31, 2026, along with the Auditor's Report. Additionally, the Board will discuss and potentially approve a preferential issue of shares and/or warrants to non-promoters for cash consideration, specifically for the conversion of a loan. This preferential issue will be subject to shareholder approval. The Board will also fix the relevant date for the preferential issue and determine the details for an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) to seek shareholder consent.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 17, 2026.
  • To approve audited financial results for H2 and FY26.
  • To consider preferential issue of shares/warrants to non-promoters.
  • EGM to be called for shareholder approval of preferential issue.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Wherrelz IT Solutions Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JSHL] JLA Infraville: Geeta Devi resigns as Independent Director
item.description:
Geeta Devi, a Non-Executive & Independent Director, has resigned from the Board of JLA Infraville Shoppers Ltd, effective April 11, 2026. The primary reason for her resignation is the non-payment of sitting fees by the company since April 2025. The company has confirmed that there are no other material reasons for her departure. This change in directorship impacts the board's composition and is a significant corporate governance update.

  • Independent Director Geeta Devi resigned from JLA Infraville's board.
  • Resignation is effective April 11, 2026.
  • Reason cited is non-payment of sitting fees since April 2025.
  • Company confirmed no other material reasons for her departure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JLA Infraville Shoppers Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [UNISHIRE] Unishire Urban Infra: Independent Director Resigns Over Unpaid Fees
item.description:
Unishire Urban Infra Ltd announced the resignation of Ms. Geeta Devi, a Non-Executive & Independent Director, effective April 11, 2026. The primary reason cited for her departure is the non-payment of sitting fees by the company since April 2025. Ms. Devi confirmed that there are no other material reasons for her resignation. The company has acknowledged the disclosure as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This event highlights a potential corporate governance issue regarding director remuneration at Unishire Urban Infra Ltd.

  • Independent Director Geeta Devi resigned from Unishire Urban Infra.
  • Resignation effective April 11, 2026, due to unpaid sitting fees.
  • Fees were unpaid since April 2025, indicating a financial issue.
  • No other material reasons for the director's departure were cited.
  • This raises corporate governance concerns for the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Unishire Urban Infra Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SWADHATURE] Swadha Nature Board to Consider Capital Reduction on April 27, 2026
item.description:
Swadha Nature Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 27, 2026, to deliberate and approve a proposal for capital reduction, in accordance with Sections 66 and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013. The meeting's agenda also includes crucial preparations for the upcoming Annual General Meeting (AGM), such as fixing its date, time, and venue, deciding on book closure dates, and approving the draft AGM notice. Furthermore, the board will consider and approve the draft Director's Report and Secretarial Audit Report for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, and appoint a scrutinizer for the e-voting process.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 27, 2026.
  • Key agenda item is the proposal for Capital Reduction.
  • Board to finalize details for the upcoming Annual General Meeting.
  • Approval of Director's Report and Secretarial Audit Report for FY26.
  • Appointment of scrutinizer for e-voting and AGM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Swadha Nature Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KATRSPG] Katare Spinning Mills Exempt from SEBI RPT Disclosure
item.description:
Katare Spinning Mills Ltd has declared non-applicability of Regulation 23(9) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, concerning related party transactions. The company qualifies for exemption under Regulation 15(2)(a) as its paid-up equity share capital (₹2.85 crore) and net worth (₹2.73 crore) as of March 31, 2025, are below the prescribed thresholds of ₹10 crore and ₹25 crore respectively. This means the corporate governance provisions related to RPT disclosures do not apply to the company.

  • Katare Spinning Mills is exempt from SEBI Regulation 23(9) on related party transactions.
  • Exemption criteria met under SEBI Regulation 15(2)(a) for smaller listed entities.
  • Paid-up capital is ₹2.85 Cr and net worth is ₹2.73 Cr as of March 31, 2025.
  • These figures are below the ₹10 Cr paid-up capital and ₹25 Cr net worth thresholds.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KATARE SPINNING MILLS LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [CMMHOSP] Chennai Meenakshi Reconstitutes Key Board Committees
item.description:
Chennai Meenakshi Multispeciality Hospital Ltd has announced the reconstitution of its Audit Committee, Nomination & Remuneration Committee, and Stakeholders Relationship Committee. This action follows the resignation of Mr. Kandheri Munaswamy Mohandass as an Independent Director, as previously intimated on March 17, 2026. The Board of Directors approved the new compositions via a Circular Resolution passed on April 10, 2026. The filing details the specific members and their designations within each of the three reconstituted committees.

  • Board reconstituted Audit, Nomination & Remuneration, and Stakeholders Relationship Committees.
  • Reconstitution follows an Independent Director's resignation.
  • New committee compositions approved on April 10, 2026.
  • Filing details new members and their roles in each committee.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CHENNAI MEENAKSHI MULTISPECIALITY HOSPITAL LTD.-$ | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [JAIBALAJI] Jai Balaji Industries: Two Senior Management Resign
item.description:
Jai Balaji Industries Ltd has announced the resignation of two senior management personnel. Mr. Sujoy Kanti Bagchi, President – Sales & Marketing Department, and Mr. Sanjay Agarwal, Associate Vice President – Accounts Department, have both tendered their resignations due to personal reasons. Mr. Bagchi's resignation is effective from the closure of business hours on April 11, 2026, while Mr. Agarwal's resignation is effective from the closure of business hours on March 16, 2026. The company has made this disclosure in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Two senior management personnel resigned from Jai Balaji Industries.
  • Mr. Sujoy Kanti Bagchi, President, Sales & Marketing, resigned.
  • Mr. Sanjay Agarwal, Associate VP, Accounts, also resigned.
  • Resignations are effective April 11, 2026, and March 16, 2026.
  • Both cited personal reasons for their departure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAI BALAJI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Management Change
